scripts.test: pnpm --filter @mammoth/adapter-contracts build && vitest run test/config.test.ts test/readiness.test.ts test/service.test.ts test/activity-policy.test.ts test/production-activities.test.ts
scripts.test:live: pnpm --filter @mammoth/adapter-contracts build && pnpm --filter @mammoth/workflow build && vitest run test/live-probe.test.ts test/research-workflow.test.ts test/research-cli.test.ts --test-timeout 120000 --no-file-parallelism
scripts.test:recovery: pnpm --filter @mammoth/adapter-contracts build && vitest run test/recovery-probe.test.ts test/process-recovery.test.ts --test-timeout 120000
